reviews.author: Mama Tried
reviews.text: Josh was absolutely amazing!!! Honest, Godly and a first responder to boot. He not only communicated with me every time I emailed a question or concern, but got my 86yo Mom’s house and outbuilding white as snow, he then left to go to my Aunts & Uncles across Wilmington to give them a quote and started working the same day…can you find any better service?

reviews.author: MIKEY PARKS
reviews.text: He showed up on time and went above and beyond getting my house and sidewalk and driveway cleaned and looking NEW !! highly recommend !!!!

reviews.author: Susan Chesson
reviews.text: Josh was super efficient & communicative. Great service all around!

reviews.author: Jason Bolen
reviews.text: Josh is a quality guy and does quality work. What more could you ask for!? Shows up on time, does an incredible job, and all at a respectable price. Our house has never looked better. Thank you High Tide Soft Wash!

reviews.author: BL Collins
reviews.text: Our home sparkles like new! The customer walk around and review is a nice way to wrap up the job, excellent touch.

reviews.author: Jacob Kidd
reviews.text: They did a great job on my house and driveway! Great communication and timeliness all around.  Would recommend to anyone and will have them come back!
